description: Separate Logistic Regression model for seven-transaction daily prediction only. It predicts whether a farmer's recent assessment pattern should be flagged for medical/research follow-up. It is intentionally not used for REBA or ISO11228 posture scoring.

values.0: No treatment-required MSD follow-up recorded in the assessment window
values.1: Treatment-required MSD follow-up or medical care recorded in the assessment window

trainingStatus.reason: The current historical REBA/ISO dataset does not contain confirmed daily treatment outcome labels. Retrain this artifact with the daily injury template once the research team supplies outcome labels.
